creator: soisixtyeight@gmail.com
text:
Hi.

I get exactly the same error with my iBook G3 (500mhz) M7698LL/A .
http://updraft3.jp.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=powerpc/121407

Is there anything I can try/log/email/help in any way with?

How do I monitor the status of this bug?

James Gagen.

My newer G4 iBook booted further on the CD but then failed to  
recognize the keyboard, track-pad or external mouse.
